message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and beads issue tracker metadata

Cargo.lock updated to reflect dependency version bumps (+82/-34 lines
across transitive dependencies). Also updates beads issue metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
